title: REDUX
description: WIP refresh to minecraft's familiar style, focusing on palette consistency and utility across the entire game!
body:
An (eventually) comprehensive 16x16 refreshing of minecraft's textures, staying true to the more modern style seen in newer updates and spin offs. This pack also aims to add some palette consistency across the entire game, and incorporate useful utility features in an appealing way!
![screenshot 1](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/9e9dfdc3dfbd5bde45a562cc88f42fb5f308b6fe.png)
V1.0 FEATURES - All planks
- All workbenches
- Randomised bookshelves
- Unique beehive textures for each honey stage
- Pixel consistency for signs
- New inventory displays for enchant tables and cauldrons
- Boat item resprites
- Animated jukeboxes and furnaces
- Randomised stone variants
- Unique cauldrons for each liquid
- New, animated torch designs
- Music disc and dye items updated
- Obsidian and crying obsidian textures w/variation
V1.1 FEATURES - All bamboo wood products
- Bamboo plants
V1.2 FEATURES - All stone brick variants
- Cobblestone w/ variation
- All mossy block variants
- All dirt / grass blocks w/ variation
- A unique enchanting table model
KNOWN ISSUES - The fletching table includes bow and arrow designs currently not included, eventually these will match what is seen in game
- Dispensers and droppers have mismatched side textures
- Ores do not have stone matching the actual block
Whilst this pack includes every single texture I make, if you decide you like a certain block but not the whole pack, smaller "feature" packs will be available on my profile some time soon!

A 3D addon for this pack is available here!
![screenshot 2](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/2b61feb4fce72f6217a38b82eb1e87457beb8dd2.png)
Is Optifine/mods required? Currently, no. However as this pack evolves and grows, its quite possible it will come to require popular mods like EMF/ETF, continuity or polytone!
Will there be mod support? Yes! I plan to support a wide variety of popular mods with things like consistent plank texturing! If there's a specific mod you'd like supporting you can always request it in the discord!
Why is there more than 1 download version? Simply, the 1.21.9 version will not work on previous versions at all, due to changes to the mcmeta format. Just make sure you get the correct version when downloading!
Can I use your pack for...? Please ask!! I'm more than happy for people to use my pack as reference for creating their own or in mod packs but I still want to give out explicit consent for that! Please just reach out via discord either in my server or DMs <3
![screenshot 3](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/7a4f7c4eef4d0d7cfb398f60d9eb6d7a45ea3454.png)
This pack is a long term passion project, and something I am working on in free time between college assignments! Please be patient with updates, whilst I want this pack to EVENTUALLY span the entirety of the game, its gonna take a while to get there <3

If you find bugs, want to give feedback, or are interested in sneek peaks for whats coming, consider joining my discord server [here](https://discord.gg/vbea4CCmbV)!
